sayfalar: This is my mother. Her name is Ayşe. She has kind eyes and a warm smile.
My mother cooks yummy food. She reads stories at night. "I love you, Mum!" I say.
Mother helps me with homework. She hugs me when I am sad. My mother is the best!
This is my father. His name is Mehmet. He is tall and strong.
Father plays football with me. He fixes my bike. "Good job!" he says.
On weekends we go to the park. Father pushes me on the swing. I love my father!
This is my sister. Her name is Elif. She is older than me.
We draw pictures together. She teaches me new words in English.
Sometimes we argue, but we always say sorry. Sisters are special friends.
This is my brother. His name is Ali. He is funny and fast.
We play hide and seek. Ali hides behind the big tree.
My brother shares his snacks with me. Brothers are great!
We go to the park on Sunday. The grass is green. Children are playing.
I slide down the slide. Whee! My friend pushes me on the swing.
We eat ice cream. "See you next week!" we say. The park is our favourite place.
Our classroom is big and bright. There are desks and chairs.
The teacher writes on the board. We listen carefully. "Open your books, please."
We raise our hands to speak. We help each other. I like my classroom!
Red like an apple. Blue like the sky. Yellow like the sun.
Green like grass. Orange like an orange. Pink like a flower.
Purple, brown, black, and white — so many colors! Colors are everywhere.
One, two, three — let us count! One sun. Two eyes. Three books.
Four chairs. Five pencils. Six balls. Seven days in a week.
Eight, nine, ten! Numbers help us every day. Can you count to ten?
A cat says meow. A dog says woof. A duck says quack.
A cow says moo. A bird can sing. Animals are amazing!
I love animals. We must be kind to them. They are our friends.
For breakfast I eat bread and cheese. I drink milk. Yummy!
For lunch I have soup and fruit. Apples and oranges are healthy.
We say "Thank you" before we eat. Good food makes us strong!
I have many toys. A ball, a doll, and a toy car.
I share my toys with my friends. We build towers with blocks.
After playing, I put my toys away. "Clean up time!" says Mum.
I wear a T-shirt and trousers. In winter I wear a coat and a hat.
My shoes are blue. My socks are white. I can dress myself!
When it rains, I take my umbrella. Clothes keep us warm and dry.
Today is sunny. The sky is blue. We play outside.
Sometimes it rains. We hear drip, drop on the window.
Wind blows the leaves. Snow is cold and white. Weather changes every day!
I have two eyes to see. I have two ears to hear.
I have one nose to smell. I have ten fingers on my hands.
I brush my teeth every day. My body is wonderful. I take care of it!
Good morning! I put on my bag and go to school.
We have Turkish, Maths, and English. We sing songs too!
School finishes at three. "Goodbye, teacher!" I go home happy.
Zeynep is my friend. Can is my friend too. We sit together.
We help each other in class. "Can I borrow your eraser?" "Sure!"
Friends play, laugh, and learn together. I am lucky to have good friends!
This is my house. It has a kitchen, a living room, and bedrooms.
In the kitchen Mum cooks. In my room I sleep and read.
Home is where my family is. I love my house!
We have a small garden. There are flowers and a tree.
I water the plants. Green leaves grow in spring.
Bees visit the flowers. The garden smells wonderful!
Today is my birthday! I am seven years old. Hooray!
My friends come to my party. We eat cake and play games.
I open presents. "Thank you!" I say. Birthdays are the best day!
Sometimes I feel happy. I smile and laugh with my friends.
Sometimes I feel sad. That is okay. A hug helps me feel better.
I can say how I feel. "I am tired." "I am excited!" Feelings are important.
I like football. I kick the ball. Go, team, go!
We run in PE class. Running makes our hearts strong.
Win or lose, we say "Good game!" Sport is fun and healthy.
I go to school by bus. The bus is yellow and big.
Dad drives a blue car. Sometimes I ride my bike in the park.
Planes fly in the sky. Boats sail on the sea. So many ways to travel!
